##RRUFFID=R110050

##LOCALITY=Mount Malosa, Zomba District, Malawi
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Donald M Doell
##DESCRIPTION=Brown prismatic crystals on microcline, associated with zircon

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
